verdict_reasoning: GALNT1 is a type II membrane protein with an N-terminal transmembrane domain. It is a Golgi-resident glycosyltransferase enzyme catalyzing mucin-type O-linked glycosylation in the Golgi apparatus. While it has a membrane anchor, it is stably localized to the Golgi lumen and does not have documented trafficking to or stable residency at the plasma membrane.
